feat.critical_failure: The target takes spirit damage equal to twice your level, is knocked prone, and becomes clumsy 1 until the beginning of your next turn.
feat.failure: The target takes spirit damage equal to your level and is knocked prone.
feat.name: Following Smite
feat.requirement: Your last action was a Strike made with a weapon or unarmed attack empowered by Herald’s Weapon.
feat.success: The target takes spirit damage equal to half your level.
feat.text: You call upon your deity’s power and channel it through your weapon. The creature you hit in your previous action must attempt a Reflex saving throw against the higher of your class DC or your spell DC.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

traits.name: Sanctified
traits.text: If you are holy or unholy, your sanctified actions and spells gain the same trait.
